select_when: Easy fluency is being mistaken for real understanding and the team needs retrieval, effort, or friction to expose whether the knowledge will hold up later.
The goal is transfer under new conditions rather than short-term smooth performance on the easiest version of the task.
Support can be calibrated to stretch capability without dropping the learner or operator into confusion and overload.
The work requires disciplined focus and productive discomfort to build durable competence instead of shallow familiarity.
avoid_when: Difficulty is being added without enough structure, support, or sequencing to keep the challenge productive rather than overwhelming.
Abstract challenge is replacing the concrete building blocks people still need in order to understand the task at all.

curation_notes.summary: Kept the model centered on productive friction, transfer, and calibrated challenge rather than on generic grit rhetoric.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor motivational sprawl because the raw source is already strongest on durable mastery, calibrated stretch, and anti-false-fluency discipline.
Did not add Wave 4 fields because this batch stays inside the frozen Wave 1 to Wave 3 contracts.
open_questions: The model touches resilience and deep work, but the operational curation surface is tighter when it stays focused on productive learning difficulty.

select_when.note: The raw source is explicit that desirable difficulties matter when fluency can masquerade as mastery, when transfer matters, and when support is calibrated rather than removed.

avoid_when.note: The source explicitly warns against overload and abstraction that creates confusion instead of productive challenge.

input_type.note: The raw source activates around false fluency and weak transfer; the typed label is a compact reviewed normalization.

output_type.note: The source yields calibrated challenge and effortful retrieval that strengthens transfer; the output label compresses that into an intervention type.

reasoning_types.note: The model diagnoses false mastery and requires reflective calibration, but the taxonomy labels remain reviewed normalization.
